UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeOvenType represents a generic oven from the WS Bake domain, which serves as a supertype for tunnel or rack ovens.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAMachinery:Monitoring: Provides information about the monitoring. Provides information about the monitoring.
UAMachinery:Consumption: Provides information about the consumption. Provides information about the consumption.
UAMachineryEM:Electricity: This data point gives the consumption of electricity. This data point gives the consumption of electricity.
UAWSBasis:Water: This data tag gives the amount of water which has been consumed. This data tag gives the amount of water which has been consumed.
UAMachinery:Process: Provides information about the process. Provides information about the process.
UAWSBasis:TemperatureProductCore: Indicates the temperature in the product core. Indicates the temperature in the product core.
UAWSBasis:TemperatureElectricalCabinet: Provides information about the temperature electrical cabinet. Provides information about the temperature electrical cabinet.
UAWSBake:PressureChimneyFlueSteam: Provides information about the pressure chimney flue steam. Provides information about the pressure chimney flue steam.
UAWSBake:PressureChimneyFlueGas: Provides information about the pressure chimney flue gas. Provides information about the pressure chimney flue gas.
UAMachinery:Status: Provides information about the status. Provides information about the status.
UAWSBasis:PackMLBaseStateMachine: Provides information about the Pack ML base state machine. Provides information about the Pack ML base state machine.
UAWSBasis:OperatingMode: Provides information about the operating mode. Provides information about the operating mode.
UAMachinery:MachineryBuildingBlocks: Provides information about the machinery building blocks. Provides information about the machinery building blocks.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the monitoring.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBasis:PackMLBaseStateMachine: Provides information about the Pack ML base state machine. Provides information about the Pack ML base state machine.
UAWSBasis:OperatingMode: Provides information about the operating mode. Provides information about the operating mode.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the Pack ML base state machine.
Provides information about the operating mode.
Provides information about the machinery building blocks.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeTunnelOvenMultiLayerType represents a multi-layer tunnel oven for continuous baking in the WS Bake domain. The products are transported through the oven on several conveyor belts arranged vertically one above the other, with each conveyor belt forming a separate continuous baking path with independently controllable temperature zones. Each level can be modeled as a sequence of baking zones. Represents a tunnel oven for a continuous baking process. The products are transported through the oven on a belt or carrier system and pass through several temperature zones that can be controlled individually.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBake:<Layer>: This mandatory placeholder represents a baking level within the tunnel oven. Each level transports a product stream via its own belt and comprises one or more baking zones, which may differ in their heating principle. This mandatory placeholder represents a baking level within the tunnel oven. Each level transports a product stream via its own belt and comprises one or more baking zones, which may differ in their heating principle. This standard does not specify the browse name of the instances of this placeholder. It is recommended to use the nomenclature of the operating company or to use self-explanatory identifiers.

UAMachinery:MachineryBuildingBlocks: This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine. This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObject.Description: This mandatory placeholder represents a baking level within the tunnel oven. Each level transports a product stream via its own belt and comprises one or more baking zones, which may differ in their heating principle.
This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeTunnelOvenSingleLayerType represents a tunnel oven in the WS Bake domain for a continuous baking process with one level. The products are transported through the oven on a belt or carrier system and pass through several temperature zones that can be controlled individually.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBake:SingleLayer: The SingelLayer represents a baking level within the tunnel oven. The SingelLayer represents a baking level within the tunnel oven.

UAMachinery:MachineryBuildingBlocks: This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine. This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObject.Description: The SingelLayer represents a baking level within the tunnel oven.
This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeDeckOvenType represents a deck oven in the WS Bake domain for batch baking with several horizontally separated baking chambers (decks) arranged one above the other. Each deck forms an independent baking zone with its own temperature control and baking parameters. Depending on the oven design, multiple decks can be instantiated, with each deck modeled as a separate baking zone. Specific heating principles applied per deck should be represented using subtypes of the WSAirConditioningZoneType such as WSCirculatingAirZoneType or WSRadiationZoneType.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBake:<Deck>: Provides information about the < deck>. Provides information about the < deck>. This standard does not specify the browse name of the instances of this placeholder. It is recommended to use the nomenclature of the operating company or to use self-explanatory identifiers.
UAMachinery:Monitoring: Provides information about the monitoring. Provides information about the monitoring.
UAMachinery:Process: Provides information about the process. Provides information about the process.
UAWSBake:TotalBakingSteps: Indicates the total number of baking steps in the current baking process. Indicates the total number of baking steps in the current baking process.
UAWSBake:ActualBakingStep: Indicates the current baking step in the current baking process. Indicates the current baking step in the current baking process.

UAWSBasis:FeedingTemperature: Provides information about the preheating temperature when feeding the oven. Provides information about the preheating temperature when feeding the oven. In special machine construction, there are often differences between individual manufacturers. In this case, it was possible to agree on the specification of the FeedingTemperature. However, it depends on both the manufacturer and the process whether the actual value and/or the setpoint value is specified.

UAMachineryProcessValues:ProcessValueSetpoint: Provides information about the process value setpoint. Provides information about the process value setpoint. For this reason, this data point is defined by the BaseObjectType with an optional ProcessValueSetpoint. If the current process value is to be monitored, the BaseObjectType in the instance must be changed to a ProcessValueType from CS OPC 40001-2: OPC UA for Machinery – Part 2: Process Values.
UAPADIM:AnalogSignal: Provides information about the analog signal. Provides information about the analog signal.
UAMachineryProcessValues:HighHighLimit: Provides information about the high high limit. Provides information about the high high limit.
UAMachineryProcessValues:HighLimit: Provides information about the high limit. Provides information about the high limit.
UAMachineryProcessValues:LowLimit: Provides information about the low limit. Provides information about the low limit.
UAMachineryProcessValues:LowLowLimit: Provides information about the low low limit. Provides information about the low low limit.

UAMachinery:MachineryBuildingBlocks: This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine. This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the < deck>.

In special machine construction, there are often differences between individual manufacturers. In this case, it was possible to agree on the specification of the FeedingTemperature. However, it depends on both the manufacturer and the process whether the actual value and/or the setpoint value is specified.

If the current process value is to be monitored, the BaseObjectType in the instance must be changed to a ProcessValueType from CS OPC 40001-2: OPC UA for Machinery – Part 2: Process Values.
